title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brookfield India REIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brookfield India REIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!
